overall_assessment: No blocking test-quality findings in the bounded RR-AUTH-03 package. The changed coverage exercises the real issuance path and persisted bearer-token authorization path end to end, including same-account allow, wrong-account reject, missing account binding reject, wildcard ceiling handling, issuer-boundary fail-closed behavior, and next-request role or membership revalidation on live account-scoped routes.
recommended_path: Accept the RR-AUTH-03 current baseline as clean for the test-quality lane and proceed with triple-audit closure from this normalized package; no additional test-only follow-up is required before the next gate.
